title: PEDIGREE TASTY MINIS Adult Dog Treats Chicken & Duck Chewy Cubes 130g - Pack of 8
features: Tantalisingly tasty bite-sized dog treats, Tasty Bites dog chews are great for big and small dogs. This dog chew is the ideal way to reward your dog; an ideal dog treat for training
Chewy Cubes with Chicken - mouth-watering bite-sized chunks that are ideal for enjoying at any time
A complementary pet food, Tasty Bites dog treats have been developed into a varied range of tasty shapes, sizes and textures by nutritionists and vets at The Waltham Centre
PEDIGREE Tasty Bites dog treats are dog chews that contain Omega 3 to help keep them fit for life, vitamins to help their natural defences and minerals like calcium to help give them strong bones
Tasty Bites are delicious small bite dog treats that contain no artificial colours or flavours, so you can feel good about them when rewarding your canine friend with PEDIGREE treats for dogs
description: From the manufacturer Pedigree Schmackos Meat Variety Multi Mix, Mega Box of 110 Strips Pedigree Ranchos Slices, Beef Flavour, Pack of 8 x 60g Pedigree Rodeo Duos, Beef and Cheese Flavours, Pack of 10 x 123g Pedigree Jumbone, Chicken and Lamb Flavours, Pack of 24 chews Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.8 out of 5 stars 20,590 4.6 out of 5 stars 144 4.8 out of 5 stars 1,005 4.5 out of 5 stars 173 Pack Size 110 Strips 60g 10 x 123g 24 chews Flavour Meat Variety: Poultry, Beef & Lamb 100% Natural Beef Beef & Cheese Chicken & Lamb Texture Soft & Succulent Chewy & Tasty Tasty, Chewy Twists Tough Exterior & Succulent Centre Dog Size All Dog Sizes All Dog Sizes All Dog Sizes Medium 10 - 25+ kg Purpose Treating & Training Treating & Training Treating & Training Treating & Training Calories and Fats < 30 kcal < 5% fat < 5% fat < 5% fat
